name: codex-profile
description: ThumbGate for Codex: a repo-local Codex app plugin that adds pre-action gates, thumbs-up/down feedback capture, and MCP-backed reliability memory.

interface.shortDescription: Codex app plugin for thumbs-up/down reliability gates.
interface.longDescription: Adds ThumbGate's pre-action gates, feedback capture, and MCP reliability memory to Codex workflows without another orchestration layer.
defaultPrompt: Load ThumbGate before a risky Codex task.
Capture a thumbs down with context after a mistake.
Check prevention gates before a deploy or publish.
